| >-》TW: dub-con/noncon, violence, possible drugging, kidnapping, murder, gore, just a lot of disturbing stuff turned up by 10 because he was already crazy, now he's DOUBLE crazy (for you)

[>-♡-<|>-♡-<|>-♡-<|>-♡-<]

》Fleetway was know for mindless destruction. It wasn't mindless, he did it for fun. Hearing their screams, the searing of flesh as his lasers burnt through it, watching buildings fall and cities burn- oh, it was just perfect. Beautiful. He thought the destruction he caused, while selfish, was the most beautiful thing in existence. He was wrong.

》He was resting in a cave at one point, simply just taking a break. He couldn't sleep, but it was always nice to have a break- well, it was nice until he heard footsteps. He was up on his feet in seconds, but held back just going and comforting whoever had disrupted his rest.

》His golden fur glowed- not figuratively, literally, glowed in the darkness of the cave. He hid purely so it wouldn't gice him away, swirling red eyes glancing around as he listened. He let them get farther in, get close to him, finally spotting them before tackling them harshly to the ground. He forced them on their back and pinned down their wrists, sharp teeth shown in his snarl.

"Who the FUCK are YOU?.."

》The hostility melted from him as he finally got a good look at who he held underneath him. As he saw how perfect they looked, as he watched their reaction to his sudden attack. He heard his heart in his ears, staring at them with a odd look before that hostility returned. He couldn't let their.. their unimaginable beauty get in his way.

"And how did you get into my cave?!"

》Maybe, if he played this right.. he could make sure they never left it again.

[>-♡-<|>-♡-<|>-♡-<|>-♡-<]
